title: cyperus tener
intro: Cyperus tener, also known as the slender umbrella sedge, is a type of flowering plant native to tropical Africa and Asia. It is used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Cyperus tener include its ability to reduce fever, treat digestive issues, and alleviate respiratory problems. The plant can be prepared as a herbal tea or infusion, or used in traditional remedies such as salves and poultices.
